name: Centuria Industrial Reit
analysis: CIP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.0400. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.0500, stop A$2.8314, target A$3.3611 (1.42:1) — then trail it.
